title: Desert Rush
description: Desert Rush is a typical arcade matching game. Your goal is to connect the dots. Three animals surviving their way out from their hunters. Master Chain reactions Bigger the chain stronger the attack. A chain comprising of 12+ gems will yield a surprise Ariel attack. Unique game fun to play, epic adventure. There are about 30+ unique levels for you to challenge yourself. Bosses change with every stage and difficulty becomes more fun after clearing each level.
instructions: Connect Gems to win The Goal of the Game is to have the Hero reach the flag In order to move the horse forward you need to create a chain of 3 or more poisonous mushrooms but they also deplete your life Bigger the chain - stronger the attack A
